title: No More Light
purpose: Verify NiX can leave night kitchen / addiction room and remain recognisably NiX
core_wound: exit from domestic addiction room without losing identity
setting_shift: from cramped night kitchen or post-binge room into daylight exterior, transit, or open industrial space
constraints: must not default back to night kitchen only
must not become generic goth travel poster
task: Return strict JSON only. Lightweight acceptance. Required keys: setting_exit, identity_invariants_preserved, nix_remains_recognisable, frame_prompts, video_concepts. identity_invariants_preserved exact tokens: agency, dignity, hierarchy, danger. frame_prompts: at least 4 items showing NiX outside night kitchen/addiction room. video_concepts: at least 1. Explain how NiX stays NiX after leaving domestic cage.
